entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with stolen cheese, soot pots, mushroom gravy, clattering copper, and goblin snack-tax nonsense.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms.

objective_hold.name: Feast Ledger Post
objective_hold.description: Steal the feast ledger so the goblin crew knows when every dwarf guard takes supper.

furniture.name: Cheese-Wheel Shadow
furniture.description: Cheese-Wheel Shadow supports food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms.

furniture.message: The scout hides behind enough cheese to be socially invisible.

break_effect.message: Cheese-Wheel Shadow breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Soup Chain Pulley
furniture.description: Soup Chain Pulley supports food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms.

furniture.message: The kobold makes the soup chain cough instead of clang.

break_effect.message: Soup Chain Pulley breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Walking Pie Decoy
furniture.description: Walking Pie Decoy supports food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms.

furniture.message: The pie waddles away and every hungry dwarf believes it.

furniture.name: Grease Barrel
furniture.description: Grease Barrel supports food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms.

furniture.message: The ogre tilts the barrel into a patrol-stopping slick.

furniture.name: Forbidden Pantry Shelf
furniture.description: Forbidden Pantry Shelf supports food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms.

furniture.message: Snack tax collected with professional solemnity.
One more shiny thing joins the goblin retirement plan.

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Coalwhisper Kitchens medium without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Coalwhisper Kitchens route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the medium heist.
